title: Karflo
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the starship group|[[Karflo Corporation/Legends|Karflo Corporation]]}}
[[File:Karflo_frt.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''Karflo 1'' under assault by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]].]]
'''Karflo''' was a group of three [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was scheduled to meet with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] with supplies for his fleet, but was destroyed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], [[Imperial Ace]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] among them.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
